pi_items.source: Verified against export_result.sh and task.json descriptions.
Verified against export_result.sh and task.json descriptions.
Verified against the install_gvsig.sh script which downloads this file from Natural Earth, and task instructions.
Downloaded the actual Natural Earth ne_110m_populated_places dataset and confirmed this field exists via Python pyshp library.
Verified through standard gvSIG terminology for varying size symbol maps as well as task descriptions.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a proportional symbol map using a real public domain dataset from Natural Earth (ne_110m_populated_places.shp). The dataset genuinely contains the 'POP_MAX' field which is used to scale the city symbols. The expected outputs are a saved gvSIG project file located at '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/proportional_cities.gvsproj' and an exported map image located at '/home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/proportional_cities.png'.
